title: ジャパンダートダービーの後に・立心

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(The race is over... and I saw the brilliance
beyond the clouds of dirt and dust.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Though the conditions and environment were
different, that brilliance was exactly the same.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(So that's it. The magnificence of Umamusume
that has possessed me since I was young...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (I have discovered its source...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer, please listen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I figured something out after running in the Japan
Dirt Derby today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is over, yet Agnes Digital has the same
serious expression as when she was running.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Umamusume are... cute.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Umamusume are... precious.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But why are they so cute and so precious? Why
do they tug at my heart so?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I saw the answer today, clear as day! The reason
is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They're always chasing after their dreams with
their whole hearts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital begins stamping her feet on the
ground.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I could only slap my former self for even
entertaining the idea that only the mainstream
turf G1 races were special!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume are always the same! Every single
one of them is sincere.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's something they want or something
they're trying to become, they pursue it with all
their might.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They compete, uplift, and push each other—and
no one ever backs away from a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And they know that sometimes they will have to
fight to be first. Yet they keep looking ahead,
unafraid of that clash.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, when they've achieved their goals,
they frolick and ease their hearts!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's precisely what shakes my soul and makes
me wanna fall down in praise!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I thought I understood this before I debuted, but
now that I've been running...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's all become crystal clear! Everything's on a
completely different level than I'd thought—the
size of their dreams, the pain of chasing them,
and the strength of their bonds born along the
way!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I flew into the Twinkle Series with the simple
desire to see it up close, with no idea how deep it
ran...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I am much too small the way I am now... I can't
continue like this!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Doto and Opera O are my top two oshis, and
they showed me something brilliant at the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm not fit to stand beside them as I am now. I'm
not even qualified to simp for them. Unless!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume myself, if I can fix my resolve
and stand at the starting gate with a pure heart,
then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Do you think that I... Can I do it?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I master the path before me, as a maverick—an
all-rounder—can I become worthy of standing
beside Opera O and Doto?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Can I actually do it?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt in my mind. Whatever she may
say, Agnes Digital has already overcome every
trial on her road to achieve what she's set her
mind on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So long as her goal is clear, she has what it takes
to traverse any road, no matter how difficult.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: In that case... In that case...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I will become a proper Umamusume! I'm gonna be
worthy of running alongside the others with a
certified license to simp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And so! That's why!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm counting on youuuu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her resolute voice rings out into the summer sky.
For Agnes Digital, the real Twinkle Series begins
now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: With that said, let's talk about our next race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run with more experienced
runners—wonderful Umamusume who can help get
me on the right track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More experienced runners would mean those in
their senior year. With Agnes Digital still in her
classic year, she's asking for a rigorous challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that case, it would be best to choose a
distance she's run already. Seeing as she's run a
mile before at the NHK Mile Cup...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship! That's the race King
dominated last year!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run there too! Maybe there's some
leftover speck of King's spirit lingering there that
I can inherit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our next race goal is the Mile
Championship in the fall.
